title: Fluorescence Imaging Topography Scanning System for intraoperative multimodal imaging.
author: Quang TT Kim HY Bao FS Papay FA Edwards WB Liu Y
content: S-EPMC5402944 PMC5402944 Fluorescence Imaging Topography Scanning System for intraoperative multimodal imaging. Fluorescence imaging is a powerful technique with diverse applications in intraoperative settings. Visualization of three dimensional (3D) structures and depth assessment of lesions
